description: Middleware + typed context, structured output channel (--json, TTY detection, table)

tasks.title: Middleware type definitions and factory function
tasks.description: Define Middleware<In, Out> type, MiddlewareContext, next() signature. Create middleware() factory. Wire C type parameter through CommandBuilder.middleware() to widen context via intersection.

tasks.title: Middleware chain execution in runCommand pipeline
tasks.description: Implement middleware chain runner: execute middlewares in order, each calling next() to pass context downstream. Wire into testkit runCommand() pipeline between resolve and action invocation. Handle errors thrown in middleware (CLIError propagation).

tasks.title: Extend Out interface with json() method and --json mode
tasks.description: Add json(value) to Out interface. Add --json global flag support. In --json mode: json() writes JSON to stdout, log/info/warn/error are suppressed or redirected. In normal mode: json() is a no-op or formats inline.

tasks.title: Table output with TTY-aware rendering
tasks.description: Add table(rows, columns) to Out. TTY mode: pretty-print aligned columns. Piped/--json mode: emit JSON array. Auto-detect based on isTTY and jsonMode.

tasks.title: TTY detection and output mode inference
tasks.description: Wire isTTY from RuntimeAdapter through output channel creation. Auto-disable spinner/progress placeholders when not TTY. Ensure --json flag overrides TTY pretty-printing.

tasks.title: Wire middleware through CLIBuilder and testkit execution
tasks.description: Integrate middleware chain into CLIBuilder.execute() and .run() paths. Ensure runCommand() in testkit supports middleware. Update RunResult if needed.

tasks.title: Global --json flag on CLIBuilder
tasks.description: Add automatic --json flag to CLIBuilder. Pass jsonMode to output channel. Ensure errors also render as JSON in --json mode.

tasks.title: End-to-end middleware + context type safety tests
tasks.description: Integration tests: middleware chain with multiple middlewares composing context, typed ctx in action handler, error middleware, middleware ordering.

tasks.title: End-to-end output channel tests (json, table, TTY modes)
tasks.description: Integration tests: --json mode with json()/table()/log(), piped mode, TTY mode, mixed output. Verify capture output works for all modes.
